untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'Relative Strength Rank >= 80' (12-month percentile rank) and 'Institutional ownership present (>5% of float)' with 'min_institutions >= 3'. These are fundamental/structural metrics not available in the allowed technical indicator set. No technical indicator equivalent exists for relative strength ranking or institutional ownership data.
translation_notes: Used ADX_14 > 25 as a proxy for 'trending up' condition and close > sma_50 as a proxy for uptrend confirmation. However, the core entry requirement (RS Rank >= 80 and institutional backing) cannot be expressed with available technical indicators. This signal requires external fundamental/ownership data feeds.
